idea-plugin.name: MyDict
idea-plugin.description:
IntelliJ IDEA support for MyDict Spring Boot Starter.
Provides real-time recognition of generated xxxDesc fields and getter/setter methods without requiring compilation, similar to the Lombok plugin experience.

Requirements
  • IntelliJ IDEA 2024.1 or later（Ultimate / Community）
  • Java plugin enabled（bundled by default）
  • Lombok plugin installed and enabled（if your project uses @Data / @Getter）
  • JDK 17+
Usage
Annotate your fields with @MyDict and the plugin will automatically provide code completion and type checking for the generated description fields and accessors — no compilation needed.

Note
This plugin only provides IDE support. The actual code generation at compile time is handled by the mydict-processor annotation processor included in the starter.
